1.title: JVM GC suspension time
1.query:
timeseries suspension_time = avg(dt.runtime.nodejs.gc.suspension_time, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(suspension_time) desc
| limit 10

2.title: JVM GC invocations
2.query:
timeseries collection_count = avg(dt.runtime.jvm.gc.collection_count, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(collection_count) desc
| limit 10

3.title: JVM GC time
3.query:
timeseries collection_time = avg(dt.runtime.nodejs.gc.collection_time, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance, poolname, rx_pid, gcname }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(collection_time) desc
| limit 10
